title: Business Development Executive (Sales)
description: Drive growth by identifying new business opportunities in the logistics and supply chain sector. Build strong client relationships.
about: We are looking for a highly motivated Business Development Executive to join our sales team. You will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, building relationships with potential clients, and driving revenue growth for Logipod.
responsibilities: Identify and research potential clients in the logistics and supply chain industry.
Develop and maintain strong relationships with new and existing clients.
Conduct market research to stay up-to-date with industry trends and competitor activities.
Prepare and deliver professional presentations and proposals to clients.
Negotiate and close deals to achieve sales targets.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field.
1-3 years of experience in sales or business development, preferably in the logistics industry.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Strong negotiation and closing skills.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
benefits: Health insurance and other wellness benefits.
Opportunities for professional growth and development.

title: Senior Sales Manager
description: Lead our regional sales team and develop strategic partnerships with enterprise-level logistics providers and manufacturers.
about: Logipod is seeking an experienced Senior Sales Manager to lead our regional sales efforts. This role involves strategic planning, team management, and handling high-value enterprise accounts.
responsibilities: Develop and implement strategic sales plans to achieve regional targets.
Manage and mentor a team of sales professionals.
Build and maintain relationships with enterprise-level clients.
Analyze sales data and market trends to identify growth opportunities.
Collaborate with marketing and product teams to enhance our market position.
requirements: Master's degree in Business Administration or a related field.
5-8 years of sales experience with a proven track record of success.
Strong leadership and team management skills.
Exceptional communication and presentation abilities.
Deep understanding of the logistics and supply chain industry.
benefits: High-impact leadership role in a fast-growing startup.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Manage our social media presence, SEO campaigns, and performance marketing to increase Logipod's brand visibility globally.
about: Join our marketing team as a Digital Marketing Specialist. You will be responsible for creating and executing digital strategies that drive brand awareness and lead generation.
responsibilities: Develop and manage social media campaigns across various platforms.
Optimize website content for SEO to improve organic rankings.
Plan and execute performance marketing campaigns (Google Ads, Meta Ads).
Monitor and analyze digital marketing performance using analytics tools.
Create engaging content for emails, blogs, and social media.
requirements: Proven experience in digital marketing, social media management, and SEO.
Familiarity with marketing analytics and automation tools.
Creative thinking and strong copywriting skills.
Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Scale our core logistics intelligence platform using React, Node.js, and advanced data visualization tools.
about: We are looking for a Full Stack Developer who is passionate about building scalable and efficient web applications. You will be a key contributor to our core platform.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain high-quality features using React and Node.js.
Design and implement scalable database schemas.
Collaborate with UI/UX designers to create seamless user experiences.
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions.
requirements: Strong proficiency in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and Node.js.
Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases.
Understanding of cloud services (AWS/GCP/Azure).
Ability to write clean, maintainable, and testable code.
Strong problem-solving and communication skills.
benefits: Work with a cutting-edge tech stack.
Flexible work hours and remote-friendly culture.
Regular hackathons and tech learning sessions.

title: Operations Lead
description: Optimize last-mile delivery workflows and coordinate between tech teams and ground operations for maximum efficiency.
about: As an Operations Lead, you will bridge the gap between our technology and real-world logistics. You will be responsible for operational excellence and efficiency.
responsibilities: Optimize delivery workflows to improve efficiency and reduce costs.
Manage and lead ground operations teams.
Monitor operational metrics and implement improvements.
Coordinate with tech teams to automate manual processes.
Ensure compliance with safety and quality standards.
requirements: Strong background in logistics operations and supply chain management.
Proven experience in leading and managing operational teams.
Data-driven mindset with strong analytical skills.
Excellent communication and coordination abilities.
Ability to thrive in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
benefits: Direct impact on real-world logistics operations.
High level of responsibility and ownership.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create intuitive and premium user interfaces for our complex B2B dashboards and client-facing mobile applications.
about: We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to join our product team. You will be responsible for designing beautiful and functional interfaces for our logistics platform.
responsibilities: Design intuitive and visually appealing user interfaces for web and mobile.
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs.
Conduct user research and usability testing to inform design decisions.
Collaborate with product managers and developers to implement designs.
Maintain and evolve our design system.
requirements: Strong portfolio showcasing UI/UX design skills.
Proficiency in Figma, Adobe XD, or similar design tools.
Understanding of user-centered design principles.
Attention to detail and a passion for great design.
Good communication and collaboration skills.
benefits: Opportunities for professional growth and design leadership.
Modern design tools and resources provided.
Direct impact on the user experience of our platform.
